case_title: MAGNUSON, ALBERT EARL III VS ERIKSSON, YNGVE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC 12, 2007 BY COMMISSIONER SLAVIT;CLERK;F.RAYRAY. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. BOTH EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2007 - JUDGMENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAGNUSON, ALBERT EARL III RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ERIKSSON, YNGVE $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $59.85 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $559.85, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RETURNING OF PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT; AN ADDITIONAL ADJUSTMENT OF $500.00 FOR DIMINISHED VALUE OF THE SUBJECT PREMISES, AND 59.85 ACCURED INTEREST ON THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR ANY PARTIAL RETURN OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT PREVIOUSLY PAID TO AND ACCEPTED BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PLAINTIFF FILED SC-108 REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER. SUBMITTED TO COURT AND ENDORSED COPIES SENT TO ALL PARTIES.

ORDER (SC-108A): REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT. "PARTIES MUST GO TO COURT IF THEY WANT TO BE HEARD. PARTIES SHALL BRING EVIDENCE PERTAINING TO THE SECURITY DEPOSIT". HEARING DATE SET ON APRIL 10, 2008 @ 8:30AM.

COURT ORDER DATED FEBRUARY 29, 2008. FILED BY ALBERT EARL MAGNUSON, III ON APR-10-2008 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR COURT ORDER DATED FEBRUARY 29, 2008. HEARING SET FOR APRIL 10, 2008 @ 8:30AM. HEARING SET FOR APR-10-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT ERIKSSON, YNGVE ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
PLTFF'S COPY(ORDER)RETURNED UNCLAIMED" RETURN TO SENDER...".
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MAGNUSON, ALBERT EARL III AS TO DEFENDANT ERIKSSON, YNGVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
